title: UCSC Genome Browser API Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for the UCSC Genome Browser REST API key entities.

GenomeAssembly.description: A genome assembly available in the UCSC Genome Browser.

Track.description: An annotation data track in the UCSC Genome Browser.

fields.type: string — Data type (bed, bigBed, bigWig, bam, etc.)
fields.visibility: string(enum) — Default visibility (hide, dense, pack, full)

SequenceResult.description: A DNA sequence response for a genomic region.

TrackHub.description: A publicly registered UCSC Track Hub.

fields.dbCount: integer — Number of genome databases in the hub
